latin: Hunc diem semper meminisse debes — diem quo paene Iacobum Passerem cepisti. pirata risit et in mare cecidit, liber iterum.

questions.prompt: What should the listener always remember?
questions.target: The day they almost caught Captain Jack Sparrow
choices: The day they almost caught Captain Jack Sparrow

questions.prompt: What did the pirate do after speaking?
questions.target: Fell into the sea and escaped
choices: Fell into the sea and escaped

translation: You will always remember this day — the day you almost caught Jack Sparrow. The pirate laughed and fell into the sea, free again.
